subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the world! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My Most Great Prison. Verily, there is no God but Him, and He Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل العالم ان استمعوا ندائی من شطر سجنی العظیم انه لا اله الا هو و الذی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
